name: vemem bridge
description: Replaces the default image-description provider with vemem — persistent visual identity (face recognition + recall) via a local Python sidecar shipped with vemem.

vememDir.description: Dev mode: absolute path to a checked-out vemem repo. Plugin runs the sidecar via `uv --directory <path> run vemem-openclaw-sidecar`. Leave unset to use the pip-installed `vemem-openclaw-sidecar` from PATH.

vememHome.description: Absolute path where LanceDB stores the gallery. Defaults to ~/.vemem when unset.

sidecarCommand.description: Escape hatch: explicit executable to launch instead of `uv run`/`vemem-openclaw-sidecar`. Rarely needed.

warmupTimeoutSeconds.description: Max seconds to wait for sidecar /health to respond OK on startup. Extend on slower machines where InsightFace cold-start exceeds 60s.
